scripts.deploy:frontend: S3_BUCKET=$(cd terraform && terraform output -raw frontend_bucket_name) CF_DIST_ID=$(cd terraform && terraform output -raw frontend_cloudfront_id) bash scripts/deploy-frontend.sh
scripts.deploy:backend-infra: cd terraform && terraform init && terraform apply -auto-approve -var="docker_username=$DOCKER_USERNAME" -var="docker_password=$DOCKER_PASSWORD"
